chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 777 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Misc. No.4144/2025 2. For orders on office objection No.1, 2,3,5 & 23 3. For orders on Misc. No.4145/2025 4. For orders on Misc. No.4146/2025 5. For hearing of main case 26.02.2025 Mr. Ali Akbar Kamboh, advocate for the petitioner 1. Granted. 2-5. Prima facie present petition has been filed to assert contractual rights and the same is not amenable for adjudication in writ jurisdiction. Petition found to be misconceived is dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Amjad
